page_metadata.biotools__summary: An easy-to-use utility to generate a big variety of chemical structure depictions (random depiction styles and image augmentations) based on RDKit, CDK, Indigo and PIKAChU.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An easy-to-use utility to generate a big variety of chemical structure depictions (random depiction styles and image augmentations) based on RDKit, CDK, Indigo and PIKAChU.
